---

title: "D04_07: Precision Time Series Completion (All)"
subtitle: "Create or scaffold time series for precision marketing"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_07"
date-created: "2025-12-24"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on: []
outputs_to:
  - "processed_data.df_precision_time_series"
implements:
  - script: "all_D04_07.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_07: Precision Time Series Completion (All) {#overview}

This task creates a complete time series table for precision marketing. When
sales data is not yet available, it writes an **empty schema** to preserve
R117 transparency and MP029 (no fake data).

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| All | `all_D04_07.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | `processed_data.df_precision_time_series` |

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
IF sales_data_available:
  COMPLETE_TIME_SERIES transformed_data
  OUTPUT TO processed_data.df_precision_time_series
ELSE:
  CREATE_EMPTY_SCHEMA processed_data.df_precision_time_series
```

## Inputs

- `transformed_data` (ETL 2TR outputs, when available)

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_precision_time_series` (0 rows when no sales data)

## Notes

- This step is currently **independent** from D04_08/D04_09. It scaffolds
  time-series support for future precision marketing extensions.
- R117 transparency fields (`data_source`, `filling_method`, `filling_timestamp`)
  are included in the schema.

## Next Task

If precision features are required, proceed to
[D04_09: Feature Preparation](D04_09_feature_preparation.qmd).
